title: Bow Load Indicator
description: A simple resource pack that adds different colors to the different stages of loading bows and crossbows
body:
# Bow Load Indicator

This is a simple resource pack that adds different colors to the different stages of loading bows and crossbows! Check the "Gallery" tab to see what it looks like.

Note that `Version 1.1 [beta]` (and newer) have been tested in all Minecraft versions `1.17` all the way through `1.20.1`. Previous versions of the pack have not been tested on earlier versions, but should still work. 

Version '3.1.2 [release]' is the version you should download, it supports 1.17 through 1.21.4

Note that any versions MIGHT work in Minecraft versions `1.16.5` and earlier, however they have not been tested **yet**.

### **IMPORTANT**

`Version 0.1 [alpha]` through `Version 2.0 [release]` are **incompatible** with the Vanilla Tweaks "Item Stitching Fix" pack. It still works, but has a weird glitch that doesn't look great.

`Version 2.1 [beta]` and newer are **compatible** with the Vanilla Tweaks "Item Stitching Fix" pack.

## Examples

Here's what the bow looks like when being loaded:

![Couldn't load](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dj5wVJsq/images/eaa20044a5ac9d27d32728c1210bdb909f880020.gif)

Here's what the crossbow looks like when being loaded:

![Couldn't load](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dj5wVJsq/images/22c81a55c4b34cc8db4f86bfadf8fc89192c9905.gif)

## Quick Note

You may use these textures in other packs or whatever, but linking back to this Modrinth page would be appreciated.

## Join My Discord

- Make suggestions, report issues, etc.
- View my to-do list with all planned future updates and new packs

## Planned Updates

- Add support for older Minecraft versions
- ~~Add a similar system for crossbows~~ Added in `Version 1.1 [beta]` and `Version 2.0 [release]`
